series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Peace Officer Training Commission Packet
series_metadata.series_description: Bi-monthly meeting packet prepared to comply with ORC 109.71-2. Includes agenda, copy of previous meeting''s minutes, copies of materials for discussion at meeting, attendee sign-in sheet, and recording of meeting.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: and no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: and no longer of administrative value
